title: fix(deps): update github.com/containers/image/v5 digest to 58d5eb6
body:

comments.body:
Cc: @cevich The PR as is looks fine, but see how Renovate is flapping between a downgrade and a digest update.

(The Git situation is a bit unusual, the current c/image commit reference is to a commit that merges the last tagged release into `main`. But that worked cleanly in the past.)

There’s quite possibly nothing to fix, or maybe it was fixed upstream already. Just FYI in case it happened elsewhere as well.

> There’s quite possibly nothing to fix

I saw a number of PRs "flapping" similar to this last week.  Maybe it was a renovate (service) problem?  I dunno, we'll have to keep an eye on it.
